metadata.title: NTOG Experimental Lung Screening and Nodule Risk Hub v3.0
metadata.description:
Browser-only NTOG educational and research prototype comparing published lung cancer screening criteria, PLCOm2012, HUNT, Brock, Mayo, Herder, VDT, guideline-reading

Browser-only, single-file tool; runs locally with no server and no patient data transmitted.

Disclaimer. Author/developer disclosure: Heidi Andersén is clinical lead of the Finnish lung cancer registry and founder of Vahtian, which provides the independent software engine behind this tool. Clinical content is editorially independent. University and registry affiliations are for identification only and do not imply endorsement. This tool is educational decision-support, NOT a medical device, and does not issue clinical recommendations.

creators.name: Andersén, Heidi
creators.affiliation: Tampere University; University of Turku, Finland
